name: Advance Directive / Living Will
description: Structured advance directive and living will form collecting principal identity, healthcare agent designation, alternate agent, powers granted, end-of-life wishes (life-sustaining treatment, CPR, nutrition/hydration, pain management, organ donation), physician attestation, witness signatures (two required, not agent or heir), and notarization requirements. DIRECT mode — highest consequence medical form. Healthcare provider must review. Not medical advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
